dsl_rule.translation_notes: Gapping-up doji pattern: (1) open > prev_close detects gap up, (2) close >= open ensures closing near/at opening (doji characteristic), (3) body_pct < 0.05 enforces the small body requirement. Direction is context-dependent per signal specification. Exit conditions use reversal logic (close crossing open) since author did not specify. Pattern effectiveness depends on preceding candle context which should be analyzed separately.

Direction is context-dependent per signal specification. Exit conditions use reversal logic (close crossing open) since author did not specify. source_rule_text: Gapping-up doji: A candle pattern where the stock opens with a gap up, and despite price movement during the session (rise, tumble, or no movement), the closing price ends very near or at the opening price, representing a struggle between bulls and bears ending in stalemate
